refreshPolicy: Regenerated by npm run mai:index before build; augmented by npm run postbuild from rendered standalone pages.
retrievalPriority: latest updated Toybox index or manifest

entries.title: Home
entries.pageIntent: Understand the current page and choose the next relevant action.
entries.summary: Flora May dela Cruz is a Senior Product Designer at Microsoft. Explore case studies, writing, open design resources, and M.ai — an AI assistant you can ask anything about her work.

entries.title: Flora's work history and background
entries.pageIntent: Learn about Flora, her work, experience, and design approach.
entries.summary: Senior Product Designer with over a decade of experience at Microsoft, Best Buy, Amazon Web Services (via Projekt202), T-Mobile (via Piktorlabs), and IBM. Focus areas — enterprise UX, cloud, security, compliance, developer tools, and AI-assisted experiences.

entries.title: Privacy Policy — Dark Pattern Detector
entries.pageIntent: Understand the current page and choose the next relevant action.
entries.summary: Toybox & portfolio by Flora May dela Cruz — Senior Product Designer at Microsoft

entries.title: Play
entries.pageIntent: Understand the current page and choose the next relevant action.
entries.summary: Creative projects by Flora May dela Cruz across art, interior storytelling, campaigns, and personal experiments.

entries.title: Art
entries.pageIntent: Explore a creative artifact or visual experiment.
entries.summary: A working catalog of pieces I've made on weekends and quiet evenings — paintings and a few drawings. No specific style, no rules; just how I clear my head.

entries.title: No Dream Is Too Big
entries.pageIntent: Explore a creative artifact or visual experiment.
entries.summary: A children's book I started writing while pregnant with Isla — playing with prompts and story ideas to create AI-generated illustrations. A short illustrated story in six chapters about a dreamer named May-May.

entries.title: Pale & Bright
entries.pageIntent: Explore a creative artifact or visual experiment.
entries.summary: An interior project I did with my husband Nick. We styled our townhouse by blending our tastes — mine pale and minimal, his bold and bright. The result: a lived-in, eclectic mix with mid-century roots.

entries.title: Tabulas
entries.pageIntent: Explore a creative artifact or visual experiment.
entries.summary: A blogging platform that marked the beginning of my journey into web design and development. Teenage layouts, early CSS, and the accidental detour from ethical hacking that turned into a design career.

entries.title: Toybox
entries.pageIntent: Use or discover Toybox tools, playbooks, prompts, templates, patterns, and prototypes.
entries.summary: An open collection of playbooks, prompts, templates, patterns, tools, and prototypes for product designers.

entries.title: Accessibility Annotation Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: What to annotate, when, and how — so designs ship with accessibility built-in, not bolted on at the end.

entries.title: Accessibility Audit Ops Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: An operational workflow for recurring accessibility audits that combines automated checks, manual verification, and an evidence log teams can actually maintain.

entries.title: Accessibility Audit
entries.pageIntent: Audit a page for WCAG issues, interpret findings, and choose concrete accessibility fixes.
entries.summary: WCAG accessibility audit for any URL — annotated report with element inventory, contrast findings, missing labels, and actionable fixes. For designers doing pre-handoff reviews and developers catching issues before ship.

entries.title: The Accessibility Compliance Baseline Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: The four global primitives every app owes the user, the WCAG row-by-row enforcement matrix, and the merge checklist that catches regressions before they ship. Companion to the Accessibility Annotation Playbook.

entries.title: Audit Command Center Template
entries.pageIntent: Understand and reuse a Toybox resource, prompt, template, pattern, or prototype.
entries.summary: A single operational template that unifies design-system, accessibility, and dark-mode audit work into one weekly command-center ritual.

entries.title: Component Audit bookmarklet
entries.pageIntent: Inspect UI components, design-system alignment, implementation risk, and next-step remediation.
entries.summary: Component audit on pages behind login — same detection as the web tool, running entirely in your browser. No data leaves your device.

entries.title: Component Audit
entries.pageIntent: Inspect UI components, design-system alignment, implementation risk, and next-step remediation.
entries.summary: Map any live page's UI components to Fluent UI, Material UI, Carbon, or Material Design — free component inventory for designers and developers auditing interface consistency.

entries.title: Dark Mode Spec One-Pager
entries.pageIntent: Understand and reuse a Toybox resource, prompt, template, pattern, or prototype.
entries.summary: The single-page spec a designer hands engineering when adding dark mode to a product that wasn't designed for it. Names the three layers it has to touch, the contrast traps, and the seams to leave documented.

entries.title: Dark Pattern Detector
entries.pageIntent: Use the tool, interpret results, and decide the next practical action.
entries.summary: A Chrome extension that flags deceptive design patterns on the page you're reading — fake urgency, confirmshaming, sneaky checkboxes.

entries.title: Demo days 0 to 14 reference
entries.pageIntent: Understand and reuse a Toybox resource, prompt, template, pattern, or prototype.
entries.summary: A live prototype reference that shows one stable interface evolving through Day 0, 1, 3, 7, 8, and 14 with a clear active-day indicator and progression cues.

entries.title: Demo Days 0 to 14 Time-Machine Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: How to demo product maturity over time without faking production data: stage states from Day 0 to Day 14 and let people jump between them instantly.

entries.title: Design System Audit Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: A repeatable way to audit design systems for token drift, component divergence, and implementation parity before inconsistency becomes product debt.

relatedPages.title: AI Changed How I Think About Design Artifacts

entries.title: The Enterprise Reflow Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: Take a dense enterprise app from 1440 to 375 in one pass — without horizontal scroll, without a separate mobile codebase, and without the breadcrumb eating the page.

relatedPages.title: Building Complex Products Made Me Think Differently About Solutions and User Journeys

entries.title: Fluent theme toggle
entries.pageIntent: Understand and reuse a Toybox resource, prompt, template, pattern, or prototype.
entries.summary: A live prototype that drops Microsoft's open-source Fluent design system into a non-Microsoft site and toggles light/dark in place. Built to look at Fluent on its own merits — strong accessibility, sober tokens — without the enterprise-brand context it usually shows up in.

entries.title: The Idempotent Bulk Action Pattern
entries.pageIntent: Understand and reuse a Toybox resource, prompt, template, pattern, or prototype.
entries.summary: How to design a one-time action (upgrade, migrate, archive, enroll) that's surfaced from six different places without letting the user run it twice. The cross-surface enforcement table everyone forgets.

entries.title: The Mobile Drawer Scroll-Lock Pattern
entries.pageIntent: Understand and reuse a Toybox resource, prompt, template, pattern, or prototype.
entries.summary: A resilient pattern for hamburger drawers that avoids jumpy scroll, stuck pages, and iOS lag when opening mid-scroll.

entries.title: Toybox Prototypes
entries.pageIntent: Use or discover Toybox tools, playbooks, prompts, templates, patterns, and prototypes.
entries.summary: Public, copy-friendly prototype source from the Toybox.

entries.title: Demo Days 0-14 prototype
entries.pageIntent: Use or discover Toybox tools, playbooks, prompts, templates, patterns, and prototypes.
entries.summary: A lightweight interactive reference showing how one product surface evolves from Day 0 to Day 14.

entries.title: Fluent theme toggle prototype
entries.pageIntent: Use or discover Toybox tools, playbooks, prompts, templates, patterns, and prototypes.
entries.summary: A live demo of Microsoft

entries.title: The Reversible Queue Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: How to design a prioritized work queue where every action is reversible, every state is legible, and nothing gets lost — for alerts, recommendations, tickets, leads, anything.

entries.title: Secret Handshakes for Designers Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: A lightweight pattern for hidden prototype controls that let designers switch personas, maturity states, and reset context during reviews without exposing debug UI.

entries.title: The Sticky View State Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: How to make a multi-page app feel like one continuous surface — filters, tabs, scroll position, and selection survive navigation without a global store or a backend.

entries.title: The Subtraction Playbook
entries.pageIntent: Apply a reusable design or operations playbook to the task at hand.
entries.summary: How to remove a feature, ship the removal as the headline, and write up the reasoning so it survives the next reorg. The design move almost nobody documents.

relatedPages.title: The Feature I Keep Refusing to Ship
Building Complex Products Made Me Think Differently About Solutions and User Journeys
Visibility Is Valuable Until Customers Need to Move

entries.title: Three-Tier Shell Navigation Prompt
entries.pageIntent: Understand and reuse a Toybox resource, prompt, template, pattern, or prototype.
entries.summary: A copy-paste prompt that produces a complete app-rail + section-nav + content shell, including the mobile overlay pattern. Hand to Cursor, Copilot, or v0 when you need the chrome in an hour, not a sprint.

entries.title: AWS CodeCatalyst
entries.pageIntent: Learn about Flora, her work, experience, and design approach.
entries.summary: A revolution in collaborative software development — improving report discoverability, data visualization, and configurability inside a brand-new developer collaboration platform.

entries.title: Elliott Bay Book Company
entries.pageIntent: Learn about Flora, her work, experience, and design approach.
entries.summary: Redesigning the website for an independent Seattle bookstore using a full user-centered design process — competitive analysis, contextual interviews, baseline testing, card sorting, and comparative prototypes.

entries.title: Mind Elf
entries.pageIntent: Learn about Flora, her work, experience, and design approach.
entries.summary: An education platform that enables every student to receive instruction as effective as one-on-one tutoring. Kickstarted at Startup Weekend Seattle EDU — startup-round winner, then advanced to the UW investor round.

entries.title: Policy as Code (PacBot)
entries.pageIntent: Learn about Flora, her work, experience, and design approach.
entries.summary: Transforming cloud compliance through simplified workflows and efficient navigation.

entries.title: Vera
entries.pageIntent: Learn about Flora, her work, experience, and design approach.
entries.summary: Redesigning the backend tagging tool for an AI-powered retail platform — a study in why information architecture is the foundation of any AI solution.
